title: Shimmering Amethyst
description: Makes amethyst clusters shine in the dark! Fully vanilla compatible using vanillas emissive model feature
body:
# Shimmering Amethyst Shimmering Amethyst makes amethyst clusters, buds, and shards shine! The pack also makes amethyst clusters and buds appear 3D when held in your hand. ## Compatibility This pack uses vanilla minecrafts emissive system meaning it is compatible with vanilla, sodium, iris, optifine, etc. ## License

Shimmering Amethyst by ioblackshaw (a.k.a. Enchanted_Games) is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0

Video content creators may monetise videos including this work provided the license is followed.
